name: Steak Fajitas
recipeIngredient: 1 small onion (or 3-4 green onions with tops)
Sirloin, sliced thinly (freshly grilled or leftover)
Flour tortillas, large size (warm in microwave to soften)
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------
SAUCE:
1. In a saucepan, sauté onion and chilies until softened.
2. Add green peppercorns and white wine; reduce until most of the wine is evaporated, achieving a syrup consistency.
3. Add half & half and continue to simmer until the sauce thickens enough to coat a spoon. Do not let it become pasty.
4. Lower heat, salt to taste. If needed, add more butter for richness.
5. Stir in cilantro or parsley (optional). For freshly grilled steak, add the meat and gently stir to coat. If using leftover steak, warm it just until warmed through.
6. Spoon the sauce into tortillas.
7. Add fresh chopped tomato or salsa, guacamole, sour cream, shredded lettuce, and cheddar cheese.
8. Fold up like a burrito and enjoy!
